title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech and Kaggle are offering a 5-day intensive course on building autonomous AI agents through vibe coding, a natural language-driven programming approach. The course covers agent workflows, APIs, code execution, agent-to-agent communication, and includes a capstone project on a farming simulation leaderboard.
